final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input clk,
    output reg [7:0] result
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        // Perform bitwise AND operation on inputs
        result <= a & b;
    end

endmodule
